message.content: Search the codebase for where `total_consumed_so_far` and `applied_to_deductible` are used/calculated. Find the function that contains this logic and show me the full context — how `total_consumed_so_far` is built up, and how the loop over line items works. Also find where `deductible_met` is updated on the accumulator. Show file paths and line numbers.

content.text: I'll search the codebase for these variables and show you the full context of how they're used.
Let me search for these variables with more context and look at the actual code files:

content.content:
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-274-4. `UPDATE Accumulator.deductible_met += total_deductible_consumed`
docs/implementation-plan.md-275-5. Derive `ClaimStatus` from line item outcomes:
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-276-   - All approved → `approved` | All denied → `denied` | Mix → `partially_approved`
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-277-6. Transition `under_review → <final_status>`, `INSERT ClaimStatusHistory`
docs/implementation-plan.md-278-7. If `approved`: create `Payment(amount=sum(plan_pays))`, transition to `paid`
docs/implementation-plan.md-279-8. If `partially_approved` AND resolved `Dispute` exists (re-adjudication path): create `Payment`, transition to `paid`
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-280-9. `db.session.commit()`
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-281-
docs/implementation-plan.md-282-**Adjudication Math (per line item):**
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-283-```python
docs/implementation-plan.md:284:remaining = plan.deductible - accumulator.deductible_met - total_consumed_so_far
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-285-applied_to_deductible = min(billed_amount, max(Decimal("0.00"), remaining))
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-286-amount_after_deductible = billed_amount - applied_to_deductible
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-287-plan_pays = (amount_after_deductible * coverage_percentage).quantize(Decimal("0.01"), ROUND_HALF_UP)
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-288-member_owes = (billed_amount - plan_pays).quantize(Decimal("0.01"), ROUND_HALF_UP)
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-289-```
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/implementation-plan.md-290-
docs/implementation-plan.md-291-**Explanation generation:** Call `llm_service.generate_explanation(context)` after computing values. On any exception, fall back to a deterministic template — LLM failure must never block adjudication.

/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-62-### Deductible
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-63-A fixed amount the member must pay out-of-pocket before the plan begins paying. Applied per line item against the billed amount. Tracked cumulatively across all claims in the policy period.
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-64-
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-65-### Coinsurance
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-66-Once the deductible is met, the member pays a fixed percentage and the plan pays the remainder, as defined by the CPT code's coverage rule.
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-67-
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-68-### Adjudication Math (per line item)

/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-70-remaining_deductible  = deductible - deductible_met_so_far
docs/domain-concepts.md:71:applied_to_deductible = min(billed_amount, remaining_deductible)
docs/domain-concepts.md:72:amount_after_deductible = billed_amount - applied_to_deductible
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-73-plan_pays    = amount_after_deductible * coverage_percentage
docs/domain-concepts.md:74:member_owes  = applied_to_deductible + (amount_after_deductible * (1 - coverage_percentage))
/Users/harshit/Documents/Personal/claims-processing-system/docs/domain-concepts.md-75-```
